name: Florida Pawn & Gun
description_short: Florida Pawn & Gun is a locally-owned pawn shop and firearms retailer in Orlando offering fast cash loans, gun sales, and buy/sell/trade services without credit checks.
description_long:
Florida Pawn & Gun operates as a brick-and-mortar pawn shop located at 9318 E. Colonial Drive in Orlando, Florida. The business positions itself as a one-stop shop combining traditional pawn services with a specialized focus on firearms retail, serving both first-time gun buyers and experienced shooters in the Central Florida area.

The company's core offerings include: pawn loans on valuables with no credit check required, purchase and sale of firearms (handguns and rifles), ammunition and gun accessories, buy/sell/trade transactions for items of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, collectibles), and FFL transfer services for firearm purchases. They emphasize fast cash availability, claiming loans can be obtained in minutes with the option to retrieve pawned items at any time during the repayment period.

Florida Pawn & Gun distinguishes itself through extended hours (open 7 days a week, 10am-7pm weekdays, 10am-5pm Saturday, 11am-5pm Sunday), locally-owned and operated status, knowledgeable staff guidance for firearm selection, and a blog featuring firearm education content. The business holds FFL (Federal Firearms License) credentials and provides transfer services, indicating compliance with federal gun regulations.

As a pawn shop, this business is fundamentally a collateral-based lending operation with retail gun sales as a secondary focus. Borrowers should understand that pawn loans involve surrendering physical items as collateral, not unsecured personal loans. Interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed on the website. The business targets gun owners and those needing immediate cash against valuables, but lacks transparency around lending terms that consumers should expect from any creditor.
pros: No credit check required for pawn loans, making it accessible to those with poor or no credit history
Fast cash availability — loans processed in minutes with same-day funding
Extended 7-day-a-week operating hours including weekends for convenience
Licensed FFL dealer providing federal compliance and legitimate firearm transfer services
One-stop-shop model combining pawn loans, retail gun sales, and trade-in services
Locally-owned business with stated commitment to personal service
No repayment penalty — customers can retrieve pawned items at any time without pre-payment fees mentioned
cons: No interest rates, fees, or loan terms disclosed on website — borrowers cannot comparison shop or understand true cost
Pawning items means surrendering collateral; if unredeemed, items are sold, creating risk of permanent loss
No information about APR, grace periods, or renewal terms for loans
Firearms focus may alienate consumers seeking general-purpose pawn services for non-gun items
Limited transparency on valuation methodology or what determines loan amounts offered for items
best_for: Gun owners needing immediate short-term cash against valuable items with no credit requirements
First-time firearm buyers seeking expert guidance and FFL-compliant purchases
Consumers with poor credit or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
People looking to sell, trade, or liquidate collectibles, jewelry, or electronics quickly
diagnosis: Florida Pawn & Gun is best for gun owners and consumers needing immediate collateral-based loans without credit checks. The critical caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical items as collateral; borrowers who cannot repay within the loan period will lose their items, and the website provides no disclosure of interest rates, fees, or terms needed to make an informed borrowing decision.
services: Pawn loans on valuables with no credit check
Item sell services (convert items to cash)
Item trade services (exchange for other products)
Buy/sell/trade for jewelry, electronics, tools, collectibles
FFL transfer services for firearm purchases
In-store expert staff consultation for firearm selection
